emails.subject: REAL-TIME LONG POSITIONS FOR DELIVERY 3/14/01
emails.body: Kate, Please find the following spreadsheet detailing EES's positions for the 14th. I appreciate you putting these schedules together for the real-time group. Thanks B Forwarded by Bill Williams III/PDX/ECT on 03/13/2001 04:22 PM

emails.subject: Re: REAL-TIME LONG POSITIONS FOR DELIVERY 3/14/01
emails.body: Re: REAL-TIME LONG POSITIONS FOR DELIVERY 3/14/01 Note to Real Time desk: EES sent over revised volumes for delivery at SP-15 after I sent the spreadsheet out today. Please disregard the variance volumes for that delivery point. Instead, make a note of the new volumes, shown in red under the heading "EPMI Length" directly to the right of the "Var" column. Contact your fearless leader, Bill Williams III, with questions, comments, and concerns. Kate Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Bill Williams III 03/13/2001 04:19 PM
